title: Create dedicated overlay and prj.conf for native_posix BLE ingress build
description: Develop prj.conf and .overlay file (or EXTRA_CONF_FILE/EXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE) that enables BLE ingress paths (ble_ipsp_transport, LCI, etc.) on native_posix while disabling or stubbing link layer components (no link.35.6). Ensure it builds cleanly for -b native_posix.
